mapper.sql: sla_instance_id AS "slaInstanceId", project_id AS "projectId", work_order_id AS "workOrderId", task_id AS "taskId", sla_ref AS "slaRef", policy_version_id AS "policyVersionId", policy_semantic_version AS "policySemanticVersion", policy_content_digest AS "policyContentDigest", clock_mode AS "clockMode", target_duration_seconds AS "targetDurationSeconds", started_at AS "startedAt", deadline_at AS "deadlineAt", status, breached_at AS "breachedAt", breach_detected_at AS "breachDetectedAt", completed_at AS "completedAt", elapsed_seconds AS "elapsedSeconds", aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion"
mapper.select: SELECT segment_id AS "segmentId", segment_no AS "segmentNo", segment_type AS "segmentType", started_at AS "startedAt", ended_at AS "endedAt", elapsed_seconds AS "elapsedSeconds", start_event_id AS "startEventId", end_event_id AS "endEventId" FROM sla_clock_segment WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND sla_instance_id=#{slaInstanceId} ORDER BY segment_no

SELECT milestone_id AS "milestoneId", milestone_type AS "milestoneType", scheduled_at AS "scheduledAt", status, triggered_at AS "triggeredAt", detected_at AS "detectedAt", trigger_event_id AS "triggerEventId" FROM sla_milestone WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND sla_instance_id=#{slaInstanceId} ORDER BY scheduled_at, milestone_id
